a: The summit is by invitation and curated ticket purchase. Every request is reviewed by a committee. We look for LPs with active mandate, family offices, fund managers, developers with live projects, and founders in active rounds.

q: How do I request my invitation?
a: Email us at invites@linkusummit.com telling us who you are and why you want to be in the room. The committee responds within 5 business days.
Current rates are listed in the Tickets section above. We have several tiers with different benefits. Spots are limited and every request goes through curation.

q: How do I become a sponsor?
a: We have 3 main tiers (Pre-Seed, Seed, Series A) plus an Essential Branding tier. Email us at sponsors@linkusummit.com and we'll put together a custom package.
In Medellín, Colombia. The specific venue is announced 60 days before the event to confirmed attendees.

q: What language will the event be in?
a: Spanish, with simultaneous English translation available for international keynotes.
Invitations are individual and curated. For funds or teams wanting to attend as a block, email us at invites@linkusummit.com.
